name: Fliki
description: Fliki — AI video and voiceover creation tool that converts blog posts and scripts into narrated videos.

seo.title: Fliki — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Fliki: Fliki — AI video and voiceover creation tool that converts blog posts and scripts into narrated videos.

when_to_use: Converting blog posts or scripts to voiceover videos automatically
Producing multilingual video content with AI voices and avatars
Building video content pipelines for social and marketing teams
Scaling video production for courses with text-to-video workflows

pros: Fast blog-to-video conversion with AI voiceovers
Affordable compared to full video tools
cons: Stock footage library feels generic and repetitive
AI voices still sound synthetic on long reads
Limited fine control over timing and transitions
review.verdict: Solid pick for bloggers and marketers who need narrated video at scale, not for cinematic output.
review.best_for: Content marketers turning articles into social video and YouTube Shorts
review.not_for: Agencies producing high-polish branded video or cinematic storytelling

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
